mapper.select: SELECT pj.id AS projectId, pj.project_name AS projectName, pj.project_status AS status, COUNT(DISTINCT pcr.person_id) AS studentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pcr.is_sign = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount FROM xm_project pj LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate pcr ON pj.id = pcr.project_id AND pcr.is_delete = 0 WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pj.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY pj.id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pcr.person_id) FROM xm_person_course_relate pcr JOIN xm_project pj ON pcr.project_id = pj.id WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pj.is_delete = 0 AND pcr.is_delete = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN pcr.is_sign = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM xm_person_course_relate pcr JOIN xm_project pj ON pcr.project_id = pj.id WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pj.is_delete = 0 AND pcr.is_delete = 0

SELECT pcr.person_id AS personId, p.name AS personName, pj.project_name AS projectName, DATEDIFF(NOW(), pj.exam_edate) AS overdueDays, ROUND(pcr.learn_hours / pj.total_learn_hours * 100, 1) AS progress FROM xm_person_course_relate pcr JOIN xm_project pj ON pcr.project_id = pj.id JOIN xm_person p ON pcr.person_id = p.id WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pcr.is_sign != 3 AND pj.exam_edate IS NOT NULL AND pj.exam_edate < NOW() AND pj.is_delete = 0 AND pcr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY overdueDays DESC

SELECT pj.id AS projectId, pj.project_name AS projectName, pj.train_sdate AS startDate FROM xm_project pj WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pj.project_status = 2 AND pj.train_sdate IS NOT NULL AND pj.train_sdate BETWEEN NOW() AND DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{daysAhead} DAY) AND pj.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY pj.train_sdate

SELECT pcr.person_id AS personId, p.name AS personName, pj.project_name AS projectName, pj.exam_edate AS deadline FROM xm_person_course_relate pcr JOIN xm_project pj ON pcr.project_id = pj.id JOIN xm_person p ON pcr.person_id = p.id WHERE pj.train_plan_id = #{planId} AND pcr.is_sign = 2 AND pj.exam_edate IS NOT NULL AND pj.exam_edate BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND NOW() AND pj.is_delete = 0 AND pcr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY pj.exam_edate
